question: What text is written on the side of the white delivery truck visible in the street scene? A. Pakistan versus India B. Wagah border ceremony C. © Stef Hoffer D. D J Corporation

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Vehicles including red buses and auto-rickshaws navigate streets near large ornate buildings with clock towers. Men wearing shalwar kameez play cricket on a grass field backed by a red sandstone wall. Green and tricolor flags wave in the wind in front of historic stone structures featuring domes and minarets. A hazy orange sky hangs over the city scenes throughout the footage.

question: How many people wearing fan-shaped turbans are visible?

Man with white beard, wearing a white prayer cap and a long green tunic with white Urdu text on the back C. Person with dark hair and beard, wearing a white kufi cap and a light-colored shirt D. Man wearing white traditional clothing and a white cap standing on a cart

Describe the sequence of scenes shown in the video, noting specific activities or objects visible at different times.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text reading Pakistan versus India appears on a black background; at 2s, a street scene with a white mosque and auto-rickshaws appears; at 10s, men play cricket on a grass field near a red wall; at 16s, a green flag waves in front of a concrete building; at 18s, an Indian tricolor flag appears on an ornate building facade.
